title: TestModel
description: Coverage model artifact representing test surface decomposition. Produced by model_test_surface workflow step.

feature_id.description: Reference to the feature_spec feature_id this model covers.

flows.description: User/system flows identified from the feature, e.g., 'buyer cancellation', 'admin approval'.

data_partitions.description: Equivalence class partitions for data values, e.g., 'coupon_used', 'payment_failed'.

boundaries.description: Boundary values identified for testing, e.g., 'last cancellable state before shipped'.

rule_columns.description: Decision table columns derived from business rules, e.g., 'order_state x coupon_used x actor'.

valid_transitions.description: Valid state transitions that should succeed, e.g., 'pending -> cancelled'.

invalid_transitions.description: Invalid state transitions that should fail, e.g., 'shipped -> cancelled'.

role_matrix.description: Role-permission matrix entries, e.g., 'buyer x cancel x own_order x pending'.

regression_edges.description: Regression impact edges to other services/systems, e.g., 'external:inventory_service'.

quality_lenses.description: Quality characteristic perspectives to apply, e.g., 'usability', 'recovery', 'security'.
